---
title: "Reading Proficiency - County Report"
format: 
  dashboard: 
    logo: "images/logo.png"
    orientation: columns
---

## Column {width="100%"}
```{r, load packages}
#| echo: false
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(conflicted)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::lag)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
```

```{r, read csv}

head(starwars)
```

```{r, send DF to ojs}
#|echo: false
#|include: false
ojs_define(starwars_to_js = starwars) #send this exising df to js and name it

```


### Row {height="10%"}
```{ojs}
//| expandable: false

// Get the data from R and make it usable (transpose it) in JS 
starwars_js = transpose(starwars_to_js)

// Create dropdown of starwars charactors
viewof charDropdown = Inputs.select(
  starwars_js.map(d => d.name),
  {
    label: "Choose a character: ",
    unique: true
  }
)

```

### Row {height="90%"}
PUT STUFF HERE
